Philippines.headline: Volcanic eruption is on going for Kanlaon in Philippines
Philippines.description: Volcano Kanlaon is emitting ash clouds according to the regional VAAC. The aviation alert level is Green.

Philippines.headline: Drought is on going in China, Indonesia, Cambodia, Laos, Malaysia, Philippines, Thailand, Vietnam
Philippines.description: The  Drought notification level is Green.

Philippines.headline: Red notification for tropical cyclone BAVI-26. Population affected by Category 1 (120 km/h) wind speeds or higher is 55.92 million .
Philippines.description: From 01/07/2026 to 11/07/2026, a Hurricane/Typhoon > 74 mph (maximum wind speed of 287 km/h) BAVI-26 was active in NWPacific. The cyclone affects these countries: Guam, Northern Mariana Islands, Japan, Taiwan, China (vulnerability Medium). Estimated population affected by category 1 (120 km/h) wi

Guatemala.headline: Green flood alert in Guatemala
Guatemala.description: On 09/07/2026, a flood started in Guatemala, lasting until 11/07/2026 (last update). The flood caused 0 deaths and 2 displaced .

Guatemala.headline: Drought is on going in Guatemala, Honduras, Nicaragua, El Salvador
Guatemala.description: The  Drought notification level is Green.

Colombia.description: On 09/07/2026, a flood started in Colombia, lasting until 11/07/2026 (last update). The flood caused 0 deaths and 0 displaced .
